title: thlaspi bursa-pastoris var. rubellum
intro: Thlaspi bursa-pastoris var. rubellum, also known as shepherd's cress or yellow glastonbury clover, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the more common shepherd's cress plant. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which are thought to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi bursa-pastoris var. rubellum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
